name: dwell-plugins
description: General-purpose Claude plugins for churches and ministries, shared by Dwell Community Church

plugins.name: powerpoint-builder
plugins.description: Build a polished, editable PowerPoint (.pptx) from content you provide, in your brand, a template you have, or a new custom style. Designs and lays out your content; it does not write it for you.

plugins.name: daily-brief
plugins.description: A personalized morning brief pulling your calendar, tasks, email, and (optionally) Rock RMS into one dashboard. Writes an HTML report in a workspace, or presents it inline in a browser.
